title: More And More End Rods
description: Add More Variants of End Rods in your game
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/McIx50jq/images/980e963d0160c072c0092cedf3f82e2ab58ec369.png)

**Some end rods in mod:**
![Some End Rod Types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/McIx50jq/images/b91ca1adbcec193e2e682cd0f6995276e6e73bbf.png)

**With Fabric version: Required [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**

**With all versions and mod loaders: Suggested [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)**

# List of End Rods

This mod will add more end rods in your minecraft:

*   End Rods made with **logs** (like Birch, Oak, Mangrove,….) (no Pale =)) 
*   **Dyed End Rod** (no White End Rod beacause vanilla end rods are white) **(Bugs: cannot be crafted)**
*   Stone End Rod, Brick and Nether Brick End Rod (Use Stone Cutter)
*   Use **Stone End Rod** to craft **Iron End Rod, Emerald End Rod, Copper End Rod, Golden End Rod**
*   Use **Iron End Rod** to craft **Diamond End Rod** and **Upgrade Template + Diamond End Rod + Netherite Ingot** in **Smithing Table** for **Netherite End Rod**
*   Some other end rods: **Prismarine, Shulker, Glowstone, Brick, Nether Brick and Amethyst End Rod** (Glowstone variant optained by villager tradeing - **End Rod Seller**)
*   **Copper End Rod** can be oxidized, being waxed, (no longer be struggled by lightning in thunderstorm)
*   Stone Brick End Rod (just 1.21.8 Fabric)

# Villager Profession

And A Villager: **End Rod Seller (Use Emerald End Rod as Job Block)**

*   Trade 1 Netherite End Rod -> 64 Emeralds (Master Level)
*   1 Diamond End Rod -> 18 Emeralds (Expert Level)

These End Rod can be use for decoration, any many things (sheepsss) =)

# Recipe

**Play for recipes or you can use creative mod to test and use my end rods in Extra End Rods creative tab**

**You can also install [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) for recipes viewing**

# Bugs

Mod in Development, please report bugs at: https://github.com/break08/more-and-more-end-rods/issues

## Found Bugs

**All versions**: Cannot craft Dyed End Rods

# 2rd Indev 2.0.0 version (NeoForge 1.21.1 And 1.21.8)

**This Indev version now can just exist in Github (Links below), not available on Modrinth**

Source: https://github.com/break08/more-and-more-end-rods/tree/dev

Download .jar file here to try Indev version : https://github.com/break08/more-and-more-end-rods/tree/dev/indev_jar

**Note in this 2rd Indev version:**

- Add: 

> Long End Rod 

> Cactus End Rod

> Dispenser End Rod

> Slime End Rod

- Cactus End Rod can deal damage on Entity

- Glass End Rod and **Dispenser End Rod** can just be obtained in Creative

- Blaze End Rod currently are not exist in game although the texture and model in archive folder

- **"Cannot craft Dyed End Rods"** Bugs fixed

- Update End Rods properties: flamability, sounds
